title: Alaska Native artifacts returned as Quakers continue reparations
summary: Claire Stremple Alaska Beacon Formline carved paddles, beaded slippers, and a small totem were among the items returned to Kake last weekend by a Quaker woman whose ancestor taught in the mission school there in the early 1900s. Joel Jackson, the Tribal council president for the Organized Village of Kake, said it is nice to have the objects...

title: Bridging NATO and the EU: Sweden’s Strategic Role in Space
summary: Due to its space sector, Sweden is well positioned to spearhead initiatives for enhanced space collaboration between NATO and the EU. The post Bridging NATO and the EU: Sweden’s Strategic Role in Space appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
